tools.name: search
tools.description: Search d.cv talent profiles by free-text query (name, role, skills, location). Returns lightweight results with an id, title, and url. Use fetch to read one in full. (Standard connector search tool.)

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch a single d.cv profile in full as markdown, by its id (the handle returned from search).

tools.name: search_talent
tools.description: Find published candidate profiles on d.cv by keyword, skill, role, location, and availability. Returns structured candidates with handle, url, headline, skills, and open-to-work status.

tools.name: get_open_to_work
tools.description: List candidates who are currently open to work, optionally filtered by skills. Best when the user wants people actively looking.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Read a single candidate profile in full as clean markdown, by handle.

tools.name: add_to_shortlist
tools.description: Add a candidate to one of your d.cv shortlists (creates the shortlist if it does not exist). Requires your d.cv API key. Use after search_talent when the user wants to save someone.

tools.name: save_search
tools.description: Save a talent search to your d.cv account so you can re-run it later. Requires your d.cv API key.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
